item.title: Scattershot 1 Beginning a New Thing.
item.description:
Hi. No OC here as usual. Did anybody ask for this? No. But I collect a *lot* of stuff. This is easier for me to share, and I straight up like the points when an album does well. No lie.
Quack!
So, what's all this then? In case you care, it's like an expansion on the usual. I just collect a lot of stuff, and sharing it bit by bit is tedious, and I forget to do it until it overflows. So, all at once, it is. This won't replace my eromeme albums, and probably won't be on a schedule, and may dip into more themed albums from time to time. But maybe I can still spread a little fun! So, all that update stuff being said.... I'm not a paid shill. But I want to talk about something I like, because it's my album and I get the power! Mechwarrior! I got into it at Mechwarrior 2 and then fell in and out of it several times. 4: Vengeance, the Black Knight expansion, MechAssault, Online, 5: Mercenaries and 5: Clans, truly an uncoordinated appreciation of big stompy robots. Specifically, ones that don't move like they are powered by a Super Saiyan reactor (Armored core is fun, but different vibe). The big draw? Piloting a huge walking tank throwing an unreasonable amount of ordinance at another huge walking tank. And as I get older, I appreciate the fact that it is not a point and click insta-headshot reflex tester. Managing your heat, weapon cooldown, armor, and allies is a different kind of challenging. Especially because AI allies are dumber than off-brand potatoes. If you like big stomp robots, I strongly recommend it! That's all! Here's the archive! https://imgur.com/a/vhx2cjG May your way be Green and Golden!
item.dc:creator: Icouri

item.title: FRIDAY Wholesome Dump To Nurture Your Soul #391
item.description:
1. Guy interviews a random citizen with ambitions to become an actor
2. Watch this if you're in a shitty mood today
3. Happy feety feet
4
5
6. Puppy fighting hair dryers of the world - one hair dryer at a time
7
8
9. Cuddly time
10
11. I love museums like this!
12. Aragorn at Amon Hen be like
13. Comfy
14. Let's dance!
15. P.S. Hope this dump inspired you to have a great day! I wanted to share my next project - I'm working on a game with very realistic visuals, but also doing some tricks to get decent FPS. Do you like the visuals? If you feel like supporting my work, a wishlist on Steam for the game is more than welcomed: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2719670/The_Milgram_Experiment/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.dc:creator: stardustLUST

item.title: AuDHD Explained By Duck
item.description: FP EDIT: I appreciate y'all in the comments, today's a hard day. The baby squirrel we were rehabbing has been introduced back for the wild, quite successfully I might add. Just depressed because the lack of her being in the house is very noticeable. I'll be making a post with a bunch of pictures of the process here in the near future. As always thank you all for the support. I Was diagnosed when was 11. - have no social life, and on top of ptsd, depression, and anxiety from military service. Life is extra spicy and extra hard - and if the exemplify this perfectly, this is the third time I've had to upload this. The first time I did not see I uploaded a video that was not supposed to be here, the second time I forgot to put a title on it because I was excited to show a picture of a squirrel I drew that I did not include this time because now I'm frustrated. But please go check out the source, I love their work Source https://youtu.be/Q4gnnU1njKA?sifOFBWRddsk-J2glz
item.dc:creator: JustGridSquares

item.title: Apologies^

item.title: What Happened Today #147
item.description: They’re rewriting reality and weaponizing it against us. Immigrants face phantom charges, universities are threatened into silence, and even your grocery cart and flu shot are being dictated by a regime hell-bent on turning propaganda into policy. Justice Kennedy told a live audience that democracy’s on the edge. Fight back before your life is the next script they rewrite. Don’t rely on the algorithm to keep you informed. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you always know what’s going on. Add your email at https://govbrief.today or find us on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/guatemala-honduras-asylum 2. https://go.govbrief.today/secret-iran-deal 3. https://go.govbrief.today/planned-parenthood-scotus 4. https://go.govbrief.today/acip-pulls-thimerosal-recommendation 5. https://go.govbrief.today/ok-apply-stop-paying-snap 6. https://go.govbrief.today/schools-sued-pledge 7. https://go.govbrief.today/kennedy-democracy-imperiled 8. https://go.govbrief.today/gop-cant-use-medicaid-savings 9. https://go.govbrief.today/tax-challenges-2026 10. https://go.govbrief.today/gdp-shrank-q1 11. https://go.govbrief.today/kilmar-to-be-deported 12. https://go.govbrief.today/petrova-indicted-more-charges 13. https://go.govbrief.today/dhs-counterterrorism-funds 14. https://go.govbrief.today/ice-raid-nc-factory 15. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-pressure-uva-president 16. https://go.govbrief.today/justice-probes-ucalif 17. https://go.govbrief.today/judiciary-subpoenas-harvard 18. https://go.govbrief.today/ogles-denaturalize-mamdani 19. https://go.govbrief.today/state-layoffs-imminent 20. https://go.govbrief.today/dem-counsel-letter 21. https://go.govbrief.today/big-balls-is-back 22. https://go.govbrief.today/louisiana-redefines-natural-gas 23. https://go.govbrief.today/hegseth-attacks-griffin-fox Yesterday - https://go.govbrief.today/fire-bertrand-trump Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/new-trump-statue Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: The Idiots of Imgur: A Double Dump pt 217
item.description: I’m back from my vacation to Japan and figured you all could use another double dose to make up for the lost mini dumps. The trip itself was incredible and I can’t wait for my next opportunity to go back!

item.title: Images of Note: Bwaaa
item.description:
I put a coin on the tram tracks and it fucking stopped the tram D:
this is what travelling anywhere listening to Good Luck Babe feels like I can confirm
:D
"Fear turns to anger, anger leads to hate, hate leads to suffering" is the best line in all of Star Wars and it changed how I saw things forever.
(Not so) fun fact: Several Southern US States had fucking Secret Police forces that existed to uphold Segregation. Florida had one that specifically went after Communists and Homosexuals, when they didn't find any communists, they went after the homosexuals.
gerrofmilaand
b w a a a
Cait a bheil an t-Sex Change ray? CAIT A BHEIL AN T-SEX CHANGE RAY?!
Journalists in America, 2025
:D
:3
baba has had enough
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky http://onlyfans.abbii.gay: for Tips!

item.title: Are they stolen memes? Or are they redistributed?
item.description:
Before I even admitted it lol
And I’ve never smoked cigarettes
I saved this so long ago ugh
My kid’s partially verbal and the phrases they drop are bananas and incredible
PLEASE
My poor brother met many walls head first (his head measured in the 99th percentile)
I will forever be bitter that they made a redemption film for Cruella??? She wanted to SKIN PUPPIES, pick someone else???
What a crazy coincidence!
Selfish tax of pictures we got last month for our 10th wedding anniversary. Love that dude, he’s the best

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1395 (panic carefully)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Blue-winged and Golden-winged Warblers regularly interbreed and produce fertile hybrids!
Not only am I giving up, I just will have no time and be too exhausted to meet new people with the new job, so... I give up for good. Maybe I can find a nice monastery to spend my end days in.
It was a nice theory.
I love ridiculous bird names.
Hell yeah, my kind of dame.
I haven't really even had time to see/read the news in almost a week. I have no idea what fresh hell is going on
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "beep beep. reeeep. Pippin. " ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 5) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride

item.title: Interesting
item.description: Source: https://www.theguardian.com/technology/2025/jun/27/deepfakes-denmark-copyright-law-artificial-intelligence Most viral edit: Thanks for the upvotes, my dudes! item.title: Pixie & Brutus: Plushy
item.description: Because today's comic would essentially just be an advertisement, I've opted out of including the final panel. I tried to see if I could find a shop for them, but I wasn't able to turn something up and opted to just exclude the final panel. Today is going to be a double-comic today, with no Cat Tax. The subject matter of the second comic should stand on its own. There will be more Tiabeanie Tax tomorrow
